forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers after 5am. Partly cloudy. Low around 68, with temperatures rising to around 70 overnight. West wind around 2 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

forecast.name: Thursday
forecast.shortForecast: Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms then Showers And Thunderstorms
forecast.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers before 11am, then a slight chance of showers and thunderstorms between 11am and noon, then showers and thunderstorms. Partly sunny. High near 87, with temperatures falling to around 82 in the afternoon. West southwest wind 1 to 9 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

forecast.name: Thursday Night
forecast.shortForecast: Chance Showers And Thunderstorms then Showers And Thunderstorms Likely
forecast.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms before 8pm, then showers and thunderstorms likely between 8pm and 4am. Mostly cloudy. Low around 65, with temperatures rising to around 67 overnight. Northwest wind 1 to 6 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

forecast.detailedForecast: A chance of rain showers before 2pm, then a slight chance of showers and thunderstorms between 2pm and 3pm. Partly sunny, with a high near 83. North wind 2 to 7 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.

sections.header: Traffic Impact: The intersection will be closed to all through traffic
sections.content: . Please follow the posted detour route during construction.

nubsNob.comments: Thank-you for a fantastic winter at Nub's Nob! This was a true Northern Michigan winter with 188" of snow and sustained cold. This summer our Crew will be busy replacing our beloved Orange lift with a new fixed grip quad lift from SkyTrac. This lift is built in the USA and will be nearly identical to the new Green lift that was installed in 2023. Thanks for skiing and riding at Nub's Nob.
